description: Product documentation quality flags for infringement scoring. Products flagged as 'insufficient' should be quarantined - scores may be unreliable due to thin/low-quality docs. Review and re-score after doc expansion.

microsoft/hyper-v.reason: 33% YouTube transcripts (2 of 12 docs), lacks deep technical coverage of Hyper-V internals
microsoft/hyper-v.notes: Scores likely depressed vs IBM PowerVM (417K rich docs). Need official Microsoft Hyper-V admin guides, architecture docs.

microsoft/hyper-v-network-virtualization.reason: 56% YouTube-derived content (15 transcripts + 3 YT HTML of 27 docs)
microsoft/hyper-v-network-virtualization.notes: Most YouTube-heavy product in the set. Need Microsoft Learn HNV docs, SCVMM network virtualization guides.

citrix/xenserver.reason: Only 9 docs total, 33% YouTube content, limited technical depth
citrix/xenserver.notes: Need XenServer admin guide, XenAPI reference, XAPI toolstack docs.

microsoft/azure-virtual-machines.reason: 4 docs, all professional sources (no YouTube), but limited volume
microsoft/azure-virtual-machines.notes: Good quality per doc but could use more volume. Azure VM architecture deep-dives would help.

microsoft/hyper-v-virtual-switch.reason: 11 docs, all solid technical sources (Simple Talk, Microsoft Learn), no YouTube
microsoft/hyper-v-virtual-switch.notes: Best Microsoft product for doc quality.

cisco-systems/cisco-application-centric-.reason: 60 docs, 11.4MB total, comprehensive ACI virtualization guide

juniper-networks/apstra-data-center-dire.reason: 28 docs, 5.7MB, focused data center management content

arista-networks/arista-eos.reason: 7 docs, 1.9MB — functional but thin for broad patent coverage
arista-networks/arista-eos.notes: Could benefit from additional EOS configuration guides, VXLAN/EVPN docs.

dell-technologies/smartfabric-services.reason: 14 docs, 1.6MB — covers SmartFabric but limited depth
dell-technologies/smartfabric-services.notes: Could use PowerSwitch OS10 config guides, Dell networking architecture docs.

hpe-hewlett-packard-enterprise/hpe-aruba.reason: 10 docs (4.7MB) but includes YouTube content, some large YouTube-derived HTML
hpe-hewlett-packard-enterprise/hpe-aruba.notes: VSX config guide and reference architecture are solid. YouTube content inflates count. Existing scores already very strong (11 >= 0.80).

hpe-hewlett-packard-enterprise/hpe-aruba.reason: 5 docs, 2.9MB, all professional sources — SD-WAN orchestrator guide is 1.5MB

huawei-technologies/imaster-nce-fabric.reason: 22 docs, 2.3MB — covers NCE-Fabric but untested coverage breadth
huawei-technologies/imaster-nce-fabric.notes: First full scoring run for Huawei in network-switching. Monitor results.

red-hat/red-hat-enterprise-virtualizatio.reason: Strong technical doc (150K), good RHEV coverage

ibm/powervm.reason: Rich technical documentation (417K), comprehensive PowerVM coverage
ibm/powervm.notes: Best doc quality in computing-runtime. Benchmark for other products.

oracle/oracle-sdn-controller.reason: Solid technical docs (326K), good SDN coverage

quarantine_summary.impact: Scores for quarantined products may understate true infringement. Re-score after doc expansion for reliable comparison with IBM PowerVM, Oracle SDN, etc.
